name: Drone Motor Efficiency Calculator
description: Calculate the efficiency of a brushless motor based on power input and output.
formulaDescription: Efficiency is the ratio of mechanical output power to electrical input power, expressed as a percentage.

example.explanation: If the motor consumes 200W electrical and produces 170W mechanical power, it is 85% efficient, with 30W lost as heat.

faqs.question: What happens to the power loss?
faqs.answer: Power loss is primarily dissipated as heat due to copper resistance (winding) and magnetic eddy currents.

faqs.question: Are brushless motors efficient?
faqs.answer: Modern drone brushless motors are typically 70-90% efficient, depending on their load and speed.

concept: Motor efficiency indicates how much battery energy is actually converted into rotational energy for propulsion.
guideSteps: Enter the electrical power being consumed (V * I).
Enter the mechanical power output (Torque * RPM / constant).
The calculator will display the efficiency percentage and total loss.
